title: SpecControl AI — ground_truth.json schema
description: Schema for ground truth annotations of technical specification samples used in Phase 0 eval dataset

doc_id.description: Stable identifier matching the sample directory name

source_url.description: Public URL where the document was downloaded (empty for synthetic)

source_type.description: real = found as-is; synthetic = errors injected; hybrid = real doc + added errors

description.description: Short human-readable description of the document

expected_parameters.description: All parameters in the document that fall within the Phase 0 taxonomy

expected_violations.description: Confirmed norm violations. Empty array is valid (clean document — used for false-positive sanity check)

expected_normatives.description: Normative documents referenced by any expected_violation. Union across all ground_truth files defines data/norms/ content.
